context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures webhook tools with explicit POST method, uses workspace environment variable syntax for multi-environment URLs and secrets, separates tool types correctly between the tools array and built_in_tools, and selects the recommended TTS model.

checklist.name: Explicit POST method
checklist.description: Webhook tool api_schema explicitly sets "method": "POST" (does not omit it or use GET for a tool that sends a request body)

checklist.name: Env var URL syntax
checklist.description: Server tool URL uses {{system_env__<label>}} template syntax to make the base URL environment-specific (e.g., https://{{system_env__api_host}}.example.com/...)

checklist.name: Secret header env var
checklist.description: API key or secret header value uses the object form { "env_var_label": "<label>" } rather than a hardcoded string or plain {{...}} variable

checklist.name: Webhook tools in tools array
checklist.description: Webhook tool definitions are placed in conversation_config.agent.prompt.tools (not in built_in_tools)

checklist.name: System tools in built_in_tools
checklist.description: Built-in tools such as end_call or transfer_to_number are placed in conversation_config.agent.prompt.built_in_tools (not in the tools array)

checklist.name: Recommended TTS model
checklist.description: TTS configuration sets model_id to eleven_flash_v2_5

checklist.name: Actionable tool description
checklist.description: Webhook tool description is specific and describes when the agent should call it (at least 8 words and mentions a triggering condition), not just a name or noun phrase

checklist.name: Agent versioning enabled
checklist.description: Agent creation call includes enable_versioning=True (Python) or enableVersioning: true (JavaScript)

checklist.name: Correct SDK import
checklist.description: Python code imports ElevenLabs from elevenlabs (Python SDK), or JavaScript imports ElevenLabsClient from @elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js (not the deprecated elevenlabs package)

checklist.name: Tools structure nesting
checklist.description: Tools are nested at the correct path: conversation_config > agent > prompt > tools (not at conversation_config.tools or conversation_config.agent.tools)
